description_long: This is a single, rustic bread roll with a slightly irregular, rectangular shape and a golden-brown crust. The surface is uneven, with some areas appearing more puffed and others slightly indented, giving it a handmade, artisanal look. The crust is matte and lightly browned, with subtle variations in color from pale cream to deeper golden tones. The sides show a soft, airy interior with a few cracks and crevices, suggesting a tender, fluffy crumb inside. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The bread appears fresh and unadorned, suitable for casual urban settings such as bakeries, street food stalls, or outdoor markets.
description: A rustic, rectangular bread roll with a golden-brown, uneven crust and a soft, airy interior. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible seeds or flour dusting.
description_view_0: Front view shows a rounded, slightly domed top with a golden-brown crust and subtle surface texture.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the airy, fluffy interior and a sloping, uneven edge with a lighter crust.
description_view_2: Back view displays a flatter, more squared-off surface with a consistent golden-brown color and some minor creasing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights a deeper crevice and a more pronounced, irregular edge, exposing more of the soft interior.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is uneven and rustic, with a matte finish and subtle color variations from cream to golden brown. There are no visible decorative markings, seeds, or flour dusting, and the surface has a natural, handmade appearance.
